query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS liver_goals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  liverId INT NOT NULL,
  yearMonth VARCHAR(7) NOT NULL,
  salesGoal BIGINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  streamCountGoal INT DEFAULT 0,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_liver_month (liverId, yearMonth)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS liver_goals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  liverId INT NOT NULL,
  yearMonth VARCHAR(7) NOT NULL,
  salesGoal BIGINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  streamCountGoal INT DEFAULT 0,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_liver_month (liverId, yearMonth)
);
